notes.groups: Group names (or unambiguous fragments). Matching is case- and accent-insensitive.
notes.top_active: Alternative to 'groups': set to N > 0 to auto-pick the N most active groups of the window. If both are set, 'groups' wins.
notes.hours: Look-back window for each digest. 24 for a daily digest, 168 for weekly.
notes.digest_language: Language Claude writes the digest in: 'es', 'en', or any language name.
notes.delivery: Any of: 'gmail' (needs the Gmail connector in Cowork), 'dashboard' (local HTML). The digest is always saved to digests/ as markdown regardless.
notes.recipient: Where the Gmail delivery goes. Use YOUR OWN address — this skill is designed to report only to you.
